---
title: "Revealing microplastic and anthropogenic microparticles contamination in tidal blue carbon ecosystems from eastern Brazil"
date: 2026-04-01
author:
  - name: Zanetti, Daniela Gadens
  - name: De Oliveira Gomes, Luiz Eduardo
  - name: Gomes, Mitchael Micael Silva
  - name: De Araújo, Eduardo Nery Duarte
  - name: De Lima Barizão, Ana Carolina
  - name: Batista, Anderson Antônio
  - name: Dipold, Jessica
  - name: Wetter, Niklaus Ursus
  - name: De Freitas, Anderson Zanardi
  - name: Bom, Fabio Cavalca
  - name: Sá, Fabian
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "Marine Pollution Bulletin"
  volume: 225
  doi: "10.1016/j.marpolbul.2026.119221"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">Revealing microplastic and anthropogenic microparticles contamination in tidal blue carbon ecosystems from eastern Brazil</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
